graphify.description: Graphify knowledge-graph MCP (ADR-0118). Exposes tools to query graph.json: find_callers, find_callees, find_similar_nodes, neighborhood.

ecc-workflow.description: ECC ccg-workflow MCP (ADR-0119). Cross-harness multi-* commands (multi-review, multi-implement, multi-test).

ecc-agentshield.description: ECC AgentShield MCP (ADR-0119). Generated-code policy enforcement and session-manifest checks.
